label: Futures Trade Panel
description: Futures order entry form shown after selecting a contract. Supports leverage, margin mode, and limit/market orders.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: Widget file does not import from lib/mocks/.

0.6.note: Context exposes no isLoading field; synchronous mock data; loading state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

0.7.note: TradePanel renders selection prompt when instrument is null (selectedFuture === null); widget shows instructional hint text above TradePanel.

0.8.note: Context exposes no error field; error state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

l0.notes: 0.6/0.8 partial — isLoading/error not in OptionsDataContextValue; blocked on BP-5.

1.1.note: Widget reads selectedFuture exclusively from useOptionsData().

1.3.note: Futures trade panel is an order entry form; scope org filter does not directly affect selected future instrument display.

1.4.note: No client filter applicable to trade panel.

1.6.note: Pure order entry; no data list to filter.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file.

l1.notes: Pure order entry widget; 1.3–1.6 N/A per spec note.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (live order entry), paper ✓ (simulated order), batch — order entry should be disabled in batch mode.

3.2.note: Context reads mode from useExecutionMode() at context line 129; mode available in context value.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same UI, order routes to paper ledger. No visual distinction currently — paper banner is a future task.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4 require human verification (submit button disabled in batch, batch indicator visible).

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers in widget file.

l4.notes: 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough (form fields, submit, leverage slider).

5.1.note: Target strategies: futures-basis-trading, futures-hedging. Widget serves futures order entry after selection from futures-table.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data imports in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 27 lines; well within 500-line limit.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No security anti-patterns in widget file.

7.7.note: No inline objects/arrays in effect deps; no useEffect/useMemo in widget file.

l7.notes: All L7 clean. text-[10px] fixed → text-xs (8.1 finding fixed).

8.1.note: text-[10px] at line 21 replaced with text-xs. No remaining arbitrary text sizing.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing tokens in widget file.

8.3.note: Widget delegates to TradePanel from shared trading panel.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no bare div onClick, no img without alt in widget file. Human keyboard pass required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Trade panel and futures table have different minW/minH and resize independently; merging would harm layout flexibility.

relationships.notes: Receives selected future from options-data-context (driven by futures-table row click).

dataContract.notes: Form widget — no continuous data stream needed. Submits orders on-demand; mark price populated from selected future (driven by futures-table WebSocket stream in production).

gaps: TradFi futures not in scope (futures-table only renders for crypto)
coverage.notes: Only populated when selectedFuture is set from futures-table selection; shows hint text otherwise.

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error fields — loading/error states at widget level require context update
TradePanel sub-component imports directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock (outside widget file scope)

findings.description: options-futures-trade-panel-widget.tsx — context has no isLoading field; loading state not wirable at widget level
findings.deferReason: Requires OptionsDataContextValue update (isLoading field) — blocked on BP-5 data wiring.

findings.description: options-futures-trade-panel-widget.tsx — context has no error field; error state not wirable at widget level
findings.deferReason: Requires OptionsDataContextValue update (error field) — blocked on BP-5 data wiring.

findings.description: options-futures-trade-panel-widget.tsx:21 — text-[10px] arbitrary font size for hint paragraph
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-xs (12px tailwind scale, smallest available standard token). 2026-04-21.
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
